name: dev-toolkit-spec-docs-mcp
description: MCP server exposing the target project's AI spec-driven docs/ tree as search and lookup tools (bundled with the ff-dev-toolkit plugin)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.verify:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist
